use_cases: Creating organic, liquid-like gooey effects on navigation menus and buttons
Adding blur and color matrix visual effects to images and decorative elements
Enhancing landing pages with organic blob-like transitions
Building creative hover effects with interconnected elements
ai_summary: A reusable SVG filter component that creates a gooey visual effect by combining Gaussian blur with color matrix transformations. This filter merges elements into organic, liquid-like shapes ideal for creative UI effects on menus, buttons, and decorative elements in modern web applications.
